seoTitle: Madora Bay vs Madura — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Madora Bay and Madura. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Madora Bay vs Madura: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Madora Bay and Madura.
heading: Madora Bay vs Madura — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Madora Bay, Western Australia and Madura, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Madora Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Madura (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Madora Bay or Madura safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Madora Bay has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Madura scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Madora Bay scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Madura scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Madora Bay or Madura?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Madora Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
